bodies.reasoning: agent plan (chamfered bar = intersection of three measured octagonal prisms; minus tendon slot (prismatic in x, raycast-measured conic walls); minus blind tendon bore (exact cylinder+cap)); heuristic suggested: csg — analytic surfaces (bspline, cylinder, plane) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 26%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).

agent plan (identical pin, +x neighbor); heuristic suggested: csg — analytic surfaces (bspline, cylinder, plane) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 26%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).

agent plan (identical pin, -x neighbor); heuristic suggested: csg — analytic surfaces (bspline, cylinder, plane) with no single dominant axis (largest coaxial cluster covers only 26%) and no prismatic direction -> CSG assembly of primitives with chamfers (cones) / fillets (tori).
